greet:
🌾 Hi! Welcome to MASCO NuAg Farmer Support.
Please select your language:

1. English
2. हिन्दी

nitro-plus.about: Nitro-Plus is a high-efficiency nitrogen fertilizer for wheat, rice, and cotton. Boosts vegetative growth and leaf greening.
nitro-plus.usage: Apply as top dressing after irrigation. No mixing required for soil application.
nitro-plus.dosage: 25 kg per acre, split into 2 applications during the season.
nitro-plus.precautions: Wear gloves while handling. Store in a dry place. Keep away from children.

pestguard.about: PestGuard is a broad-spectrum systemic insecticide effective against aphids, bollworms, and stem borers.
pestguard.usage: Spray in early morning or evening. Avoid spraying during flowering stage.
pestguard.dosage: 2ml per litre of water, spray 200 litres per acre.
pestguard.precautions: Wear a mask and gloves. Do not spray near water bodies. Re-entry after 24 hours.

fungishield.about: FungiShield is a broad-spectrum fungicide for rust, blast, and blight diseases.
fungishield.usage: Spray at first sign of infection, repeat after 10-15 days if needed.
fungishield.precautions: Avoid spraying before rain. Wear protective gear.

mag-rich.about: Mag-Rich is a magnesium supplement that corrects lower-leaf yellowing in wheat, rice, and vegetables.
mag-rich.usage: Foliar spray for quick correction, or soil application for long-term supply.
mag-rich.dosage: 1% solution (10g per litre) for spray, or 5 kg/acre as soil application.
mag-rich.precautions: Do not mix with alkaline products. Store in a cool, dry place.

bollguard.about: BollGuard is a targeted insecticide for bollworm control in cotton.
bollguard.usage: Spray in the evening. Combine with pheromone traps for best results.
bollguard.precautions: Keep away from beneficial insects like bees. Wear gloves and mask.

wheat.nutrition:
🌾 Wheat Nutrition Recommendations:

✅ At Sowing:
- DAP: 50 kg/acre
- MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing (21-25 days):
- Urea: 25 kg/acre

✅ Second Top Dressing (45 days):
- Urea: 25 kg/acre

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.deficiency:
🌾 Common Wheat Deficiencies:

🟡 Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency
→ Apply Urea @ 25 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

🟡 Lower leaf yellow = Magnesium deficiency
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Mag-Rich

🟡 Slow growth = Zinc deficiency
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Zinc-Max

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.insecticide:
🌾 Wheat Insecticide Recommendations:

🐛 Aphids:
→ Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg AphidKill

🐛 Army Worm:
→ Spray Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg PestGuard

🐛 Termites:
→ Drench with Chlorpyriphos @ 3ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg TermiStop

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.weedicide:
🌾 Wheat Weedicide Recommendations:

🌿 Narrow leaf weeds:
→ Clodinafop Propargyl 15 WP @ 160g/acre
→ Apply 30-35 days after sowing

🌿 Broad leaf weeds:
→ 2,4-D Amine Salt @ 500ml/acre
→ Apply 25-30 days after sowing

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg WeedClear
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.fungicide:
🌾 Wheat Fungicide Recommendations:

🍄 Yellow/Brown Rust:
→ Propiconazole 25 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg FungiShield

🍄 Powdery Mildew:
→ Tebuconazole 25.9 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg RustGuard

⏰ Best time: Spray at first sign of disease
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX

rice.nutrition:
🌾 Rice Nutrition Recommendations:

✅ At Transplanting:
- DAP: 35 kg/acre
- MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing 1 (21 days):
- Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing 2 (45 days):
- Urea: 20 kg/acre

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg Rice Kit
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.deficiency:
🌾 Common Rice Deficiencies:

🟡 Yellowing = Iron/Nitrogen deficiency
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Iron-Rich

🟡 Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

🟡 White tips = Zinc deficiency
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Zinc-Max

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.insecticide:
🌾 Rice Insecticide Recommendations:

→ Buprofezin 25 SC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg HopperStop

🐛 Stem Borer:
→ Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg PestGuard

🐛 Leaf Folder:
→ Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg BollGuard

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.weedicide:
🌾 Rice Weedicide Recommendations:

🌿 Early weeds (0-3 days after transplant):
→ Pretilachlor 50 EC @ 500ml/acre

🌿 Mixed weeds (15-20 days):

cotton.nutrition:
🌾 Cotton Nutrition Recommendations:

✅ At Sowing:
- DAP: 40 kg/acre
- MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing 1 (30 days):
- Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing 2 (60 days):
- Urea: 20 kg/acre + SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg Cotton Kit
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.deficiency:
🌾 Common Cotton Deficiencies:

🟡 Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency
→ Apply Urea @ 20 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

🟡 Red/Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency
→ Apply DAP @ 15 kg/acre

🟡 Leaf curl = Magnesium deficiency
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Mag-Rich

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX

🌾 Cotton Insecticide Recommendations:

🐛 Aphids:

→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg AphidKill

🌾 Cotton Weedicide Recommendations:

🌿 Pre-emergence (0-3 days after sowing):
→ Pendimethalin 30 EC @ 1 litre/acre

🌿 Post-emergence (15-20 days):
→ Quizalofop Ethyl @ 400ml/acre

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg WeedClear
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX

🌾 Cotton Fungicide Recommendations:

🍄 Root Rot:
→ Carbendazim @ 1g/litre (soil drench)
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg FungiShield

🍄 Alternaria Leaf Spot:

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX

tomato.nutrition:
🍅 Tomato Nutrition Recommendations:

✅ At Transplanting:
- DAP: 30 kg/acre
- MOP: 15 kg/acre

✅ Top Dressing (30 days):
- Urea: 25 kg/acre

✅ At Fruiting:
- SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 Recommended: MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus
📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.deficiency:
🍅 Common Tomato Deficiencies:

🟡 Yellow leaves = Nitrogen/Iron deficiency
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg Iron-Rich

🟡 Blossom end rot = Calcium deficiency
→ Spray Calcium Nitrate @ 1%

🟡 Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

📞 Helpline: 1800-XXX-XXXX
